nodes.label: Sea of Tiberias sign → abundance → breakfast
Peter restored → feed sheep → follow me → redirected comparisons

hinges.identity_□: The risen Jesus is the Shepherd-King who restores and commissions.
hinges.enactment_◇: He directs abundance, hosts a meal, questions Peter’s love, commissions feeding, and calls him to follow.
hinges.effect_Δ: Peter is restored into shepherding; disciples are anchored in witness, not comparison.
